name: STMICROELECTRONICS NY 1
summary: STMicroelectronics is a global semiconductor company that designs, develops, manufactures, and markets a broad range of products, including discrete and standard commodity components and application-specific integrated circuits. Headquartered in Geneva, Switzerland, the company serves customers across various industries, including automotive, industrial, personal electronics, and communications equipment. STMicroelectronics is a leading player in the semiconductor industry.
